title: TheGodFather Code
save_password_prompt: Do you want to save the generated password to an encrypted file?
empty_input: Please enter a message or hidden text.
message_too_long: Message exceeds maximum length of {} characters.
invalid_timeout: Invalid timeout value. Use a number or 0 to disable.
lang_tooltip: Select the language for the interface and cover text.
encrypt_tooltip: Encrypt a message and hide it in text.
decrypt_tooltip: Decrypt a message hidden in text.
password_tooltip: Enter a password (minimum 12 characters, with uppercase and digits).
generate_password_tooltip: Generate a secure password that auto-deletes after 5 seconds.
copy_password_tooltip: Copy the generated password to the clipboard.
load_password_tooltip: Load a saved password from an encrypted file.
timeout_tooltip: Time in milliseconds before data is automatically cleared (0 to disable).
message_tooltip: Enter the message to encrypt or the hidden text to decrypt.
process_tooltip: Execute the encryption or decryption process.
copy_tooltip: Copy the result to the clipboard.
toggle_theme_tooltip: Switch between dark and light themes.
